mapper.select:
SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT MTGL.GATE_CD , MTGL.ITEM_CD , MTGL.STD_FLAG , MTGL.ITEM_DESC , MTGL.ITEM_SPEC , MTGL.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(MTGL.GATE_CD, MTGL.BUYER_CD, 'MK', MTGL.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , MTGL.MAKER_PART_NO , MTGL.BRAND_CD , GETMKBRNAME(MTGL.GATE_CD, MTGL.BUYER_CD, 'BR', MTGL.BRAND_CD) AS BRAND_NM , MTGL.ORIGIN_CD , MTGL.ITEM_STATUS , (MTGL.MOD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') MOD_DATE , MTGL.MOD_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(MTGL.GATE_CD, MTGL.MOD_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS MOD_USER_NM , GETITEMCLASSPATH(MTGL.GATE_CD, #{ses.manageCd}, MTGL.ITEM_CD) AS ITEM_CLS_NM , MTGL.BUYER_CD , MTGL.STD_ITEM_CD , MTGC.ITEM_CLS1 , MTGC.ITEM_CLS2 , MTGC.ITEM_CLS3 , MTGC.ITEM_CLS4 FROM STOCMTGL MTGL LEFT JOIN STOCMTGC MTGC ON (MTGL.GATE_CD = MTGC.GATE_CD AND MTGL.BUYER_CD = MTGC.BUYER_CD AND MTGL.ITEM_CD = MTGC.ITEM_CD AND MTGC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE MTGL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND MTGL.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE 1=1
AND A.ITEM_CLS1 = #{ITEM_CLS1}
AND A.ITEM_CLS2 = #{ITEM_CLS2}
AND A.ITEM_CLS3 = #{ITEM_CLS3}
AND A.ITEM_CLS4 = #{ITEM_CLS4}
AND UPPER(A.ITEM_CD) LIKE '%'UPPER(#{ITEM_CD})'%'
AND A.STD_FLAG LIKE '%'#{STD_FLAG}'%'
AND A.ITEM_STATUS LIKE '%'#{ITEM_STATUS}'%'
AND (${ITEM_DESC})
AND (${ITEM_SPEC})
AND GETUSERNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.MOD_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) LIKE '%'#{MOD_USER_NM}'%'
AND UPPER(A.MAKER_CD) LIKE '%'UPPER(#{MAKER_CD})'%'
AND (${MAKER_NM})
AND UPPER(A.MAKER_PART_NO) LIKE '%'UPPER(#{MAKER_PART_NO})'%'
AND UPPER(A.BRAND_CD) LIKE '%'UPPER(#{BRAND_CD})'%'
AND (${BRAND_NM})
) B WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY B.ITEM_CD

select.if:
SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN ITEM_CLS1 WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN ITEM_CLS2 WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN ITEM_CLS3 ELSE A.ITEM_CLS4 END "tree" , A.SORT_SQ , A.ITEM_CLS_NM , A.ITEM_CLS1 , A.ITEM_CLS2 , A.ITEM_CLS3 , A.ITEM_CLS4 , CASE WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN null WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'1') WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'2') WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'3') ELSE null END PARENT_PATH_NM , CASE WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'1') WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'1') ' > ' GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'2') WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'1') ' > ' GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'2') ' > ' GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'3') WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'1') ' > ' GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'2') ' > ' GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'3') ' > ' ITEM_CLS_NM ELSE '' END ITEM_CLS_PATH_NM , ITEM_CLS , UP_ITEM_CLS FROM ( SELECT GATE_CD , DECODE(ITEM_CLS2,'*',ITEM_CLS1 , DECODE(ITEM_CLS3,'*',ITEM_CLS2 , DECODE(ITEM_CLS4,'*',ITEM_CLS3,ITEM_CLS4))) AS ITEM_CLS , DECODE(ITEM_CLS2,'*','' , DECODE(ITEM_CLS3,'*',ITEM_CLS1 , DECODE(ITEM_CLS4,'*',ITEM_CLS2,ITEM_CLS3))) AS UP_ITEM_CLS , A.SORT_SQ , A.ITEM_CLS_NM , A.ITEM_CLS1 , A.ITEM_CLS2 , A.ITEM_CLS3 , A.ITEM_CLS4 , A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE FROM STOCMTCA A WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND A.USE_FLAG = '1' ) A -- 대분류
START WITH UPPER(ITEM_CLS_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CLS_NM}) '%'
CONNECT BY ITEM_CLS = PRIOR UP_ITEM_CLS ORDER BY A.ITEM_CLS1,A.ITEM_CLS2,A.ITEM_CLS3,A.ITEM_CLS4,A.SORT_SQ

WITH CTE_TABLE(GATE_CD, BUYER_CD, SORT_SQ, ITEM_CLS_NM, ITEM_CLS1, ITEM_CLS2, ITEM_CLS3, ITEM_CLS4, ITEM_CLS_TYPE, ITEM_CLS, UP_ITEM_CLS) AS ( SELECT A.GATE_CD , A.BUYER_CD , A.SORT_SQ , A.ITEM_CLS_NM , A.ITEM_CLS1 , A.ITEM_CLS2 , A.ITEM_CLS3 , A.ITEM_CLS4 , A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , A.ITEM_CLS , A.UP_ITEM_CLS FROM STOCMTCA A WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{CUST_CD}
AND UPPER( A.ITEM_CLS_NM ) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CLS_NM}) '%'
AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND A.USE_FLAG = '1'
UNION ALL
SELECT T.GATE_CD , T.BUYER_CD , T.SORT_SQ , T.ITEM_CLS_NM , T.ITEM_CLS1 , T.ITEM_CLS2 , T.ITEM_CLS3 , T.ITEM_CLS4 , T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , T.ITEM_CLS , T.UP_ITEM_CLS FROM ( SELECT M.GATE_CD , M.BUYER_CD , M.SORT_SQ , M.ITEM_CLS_NM , M.ITEM_CLS1 , M.ITEM_CLS2 , M.ITEM_CLS3 , M.ITEM_CLS4 , M.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , M.ITEM_CLS , M.UP_ITEM_CLS FROM STOCMTCA M WHERE M.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND M.BUYER_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND M.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND M.USE_FLAG = '1' ) T JOIN CTE_TABLE N ON (T.GATE_CD = N.GATE_CD AND T.BUYER_CD = N.BUYER_CD AND T.ITEM_CLS = N.UP_ITEM_CLS) ) SELECT DISTINCT (CASE WHEN C.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN C.ITEM_CLS1 WHEN C.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN C.ITEM_CLS2 WHEN C.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN C.ITEM_CLS3 ELSE C.ITEM_CLS4 END) "tree" , C.SORT_SQ , C.ITEM_CLS_NM , C.ITEM_CLS1 , C.ITEM_CLS2 , C.ITEM_CLS3 , C.ITEM_CLS4 , C.ITEM_CLS , C.UP_ITEM_CLS , P.ITEM_CLS_PATH_NM , (SELECT MAX(GATE_CD) FROM STOCMTCA WHERE GATE_CD =#{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD=#{CUST_CD} AND UP_ITEM_CLS=C.ITEM_CLS) AS UPYN , ((SELECT MAX(SG_NUM) FROM STOCSGMC WHERE M_CATE_YN='1' AND ITEM_CLS1=C.ITEM_CLS1 and ITEM_CLS2=C.ITEM_CLS2 and ITEM_CLS3 =C.ITEM_CLS3 and ITEM_CLS4 = C.ITEM_CLS4),'') AS SG_YN , ((SELECT CTRL_USER_ID FROM STOCSGMT WHERE SG_NUM = (SELECT MAX(SG_NUM) FROM STOCSGMC WHERE M_CATE_YN='1' AND ITEM_CLS1=C.ITEM_CLS1 and ITEM_CLS2=C.ITEM_CLS2 and ITEM_CLS3 =C.ITEM_CLS3 and ITEM_CLS4 = C.ITEM_CLS4)),'') AS SG_CTRL_USER_ID , ((SELECT getUserName(GATE_CD, CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) FROM STOCSGMT WHERE SG_NUM = (SELECT MAX(SG_NUM) FROM STOCSGMC WHERE M_CATE_YN='1' AND ITEM_CLS1=C.ITEM_CLS1 and ITEM_CLS2=C.ITEM_CLS2 and ITEM_CLS3 =C.ITEM_CLS3 and ITEM_CLS4 = C.ITEM_CLS4)),'') AS SG_CTRL_USER_NM FROM CTE_TABLE C JOIN ( SELECT MTCA.GATE_CD , MTCA.BUYER_CD , MTCA.ITEM_CLS1 , MTCA.ITEM_CLS2 , MTCA.ITEM_CLS3 , MTCA.ITEM_CLS4 , MTC1.ITEM_CLS_NM CASE WHEN MTC2.ITEM_CLS_NM IS NOT NULL THEN ' > ' MTC2.ITEM_CLS_NM ELSE '' END CASE WHEN MTC3.ITEM_CLS_NM IS NOT NULL THEN ' > ' MTC3.ITEM_CLS_NM ELSE '' END CASE WHEN MTC4.ITEM_CLS_NM IS NOT NULL THEN ' > ' MTC4.ITEM_CLS_NM ELSE '' END AS ITEM_CLS_PATH_NM FROM STOCMTCA MTCA LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCMTCA MTC1 ON (MTCA.GATE_CD = MTC1.GATE_CD AND MTCA.BUYER_CD = MTC1.BUYER_CD AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS1 = MTC1.ITEM_CLS1 AND MTC1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' AND MTC1.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCMTCA MTC2 ON (MTCA.GATE_CD = MTC2.GATE_CD AND MTCA.BUYER_CD = MTC2.BUYER_CD AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS1 = MTC2.ITEM_CLS1 AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS2 = MTC2.ITEM_CLS2 AND MTC2.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' AND MTC2.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCMTCA MTC3 ON (MTCA.GATE_CD = MTC3.GATE_CD AND MTCA.BUYER_CD = MTC3.BUYER_CD AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS1 = MTC3.ITEM_CLS1 AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS2 = MTC3.ITEM_CLS2 AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS3 = MTC3.ITEM_CLS3 AND MTC3.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' AND MTC3.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCMTCA MTC4 ON (MTCA.GATE_CD = MTC4.GATE_CD AND MTCA.BUYER_CD = MTC4.BUYER_CD AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS1 = MTC4.ITEM_CLS1 AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS2 = MTC4.ITEM_CLS2 AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS3 = MTC4.ITEM_CLS3 AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS4 = MTC4.ITEM_CLS4 AND MTC4.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' AND MTC4.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE MTCA.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND MTCA.BUYER_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND MTCA.USE_FLAG = '1' AND MTCA.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) P ON (C.GATE_CD = P.GATE_CD AND C.BUYER_CD = P.BUYER_CD AND C.ITEM_CLS1 = P.ITEM_CLS1 AND C.ITEM_CLS2 = P.ITEM_CLS2 AND C.ITEM_CLS3 = P.ITEM_CLS3 AND C.ITEM_CLS4 = P.ITEM_CLS4) WHERE 1 = 1
OR UPPER(P.ITEM_CLS_PATH_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CLS_NM}) '%'
ORDER BY C.ITEM_CLS1, C.ITEM_CLS2, C.ITEM_CLS3, C.ITEM_CLS4, C.SORT_SQ

SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN ITEM_CLS1 WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN ITEM_CLS2 WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN ITEM_CLS3 ELSE A.ITEM_CLS4 END "tree" , A.SORT_SQ , A.ITEM_CLS_NM , A.ITEM_CLS1 , A.ITEM_CLS2 , A.ITEM_CLS3 , A.ITEM_CLS4 , CASE WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN null WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'1') WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'2') WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'3') ELSE null END PARENT_PATH_NM , CASE WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'1') WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'1') ' > ' GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'2') WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'1') ' > ' GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'2') ' > ' GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'3') WHEN A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'1') ' > ' GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'2') ' > ' GETITEMCLASS2(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, A.ITEM_CLS1, A.ITEM_CLS2, A.ITEM_CLS3, A.ITEM_CLS4,'3') ' > ' ITEM_CLS_NM ELSE '' END ITEM_CLS_PATH_NM , ITEM_CLS , UP_ITEM_CLS ,(SELECT MAX(GATE_CD) FROM STOCMTCA WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND UP_ITEM_CLS= A.ITEM_CLS) AS UPYN FROM ( SELECT A.GATE_CD , A.BUYER_CD , DECODE(A.ITEM_CLS2,'*',A.ITEM_CLS1 , DECODE(A.ITEM_CLS3,'*',A.ITEM_CLS2 , DECODE(A.ITEM_CLS4,'*',A.ITEM_CLS3,A.ITEM_CLS4))) AS ITEM_CLS , DECODE(A.ITEM_CLS2,'*','' , DECODE(A.ITEM_CLS3,'*',A.ITEM_CLS1 , DECODE(A.ITEM_CLS4,'*',A.ITEM_CLS2,A.ITEM_CLS3))) AS UP_ITEM_CLS , A.SORT_SQ , A.ITEM_CLS_NM , A.ITEM_CLS1 , A.ITEM_CLS2 , A.ITEM_CLS3 , A.ITEM_CLS4 , A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE FROM STOCMTCA A WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{ses.manageCd} AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND A.USE_FLAG = '1'
AND A.ITEM_CLS1 = 'S1'
AND A.ITEM_CLS1 = 'S2'
-- 대분류 ) A
START WITH UPPER(ITEM_CLS_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CLS_NM}) '%'
CONNECT BY ITEM_CLS = PRIOR UP_ITEM_CLS ORDER BY A.ITEM_CLS1,A.ITEM_CLS2,A.ITEM_CLS3,A.ITEM_CLS4

WITH CTE_TABLE(GATE_CD, BUYER_CD, SORT_SQ, ITEM_CLS_NM, ITEM_CLS1, ITEM_CLS2, ITEM_CLS3, ITEM_CLS4, ITEM_CLS_TYPE, ITEM_CLS, UP_ITEM_CLS) AS ( SELECT A.GATE_CD , A.BUYER_CD , A.SORT_SQ , A.ITEM_CLS_NM , A.ITEM_CLS1 , A.ITEM_CLS2 , A.ITEM_CLS3 , A.ITEM_CLS4 , A.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , A.ITEM_CLS , A.UP_ITEM_CLS FROM STOCMTCA A WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.BUYER_CD = #{CUST_CD}
AND UPPER( A.ITEM_CLS_NM ) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CLS_NM}) '%'
AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND A.USE_FLAG = '1'
UNION ALL
SELECT T.GATE_CD , T.BUYER_CD , T.SORT_SQ , T.ITEM_CLS_NM , T.ITEM_CLS1 , T.ITEM_CLS2 , T.ITEM_CLS3 , T.ITEM_CLS4 , T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , T.ITEM_CLS , T.UP_ITEM_CLS FROM ( SELECT M.GATE_CD , M.BUYER_CD , M.SORT_SQ , M.ITEM_CLS_NM , M.ITEM_CLS1 , M.ITEM_CLS2 , M.ITEM_CLS3 , M.ITEM_CLS4 , M.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , M.ITEM_CLS , M.UP_ITEM_CLS FROM STOCMTCA M WHERE M.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND M.BUYER_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND M.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND M.USE_FLAG = '1' ) T JOIN CTE_TABLE N ON (T.GATE_CD = N.GATE_CD AND T.BUYER_CD = N.BUYER_CD AND T.ITEM_CLS = N.UP_ITEM_CLS) ) SELECT DISTINCT (CASE WHEN C.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN C.ITEM_CLS1 WHEN C.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN C.ITEM_CLS2 WHEN C.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN C.ITEM_CLS3 ELSE C.ITEM_CLS4 END) "tree" , C.SORT_SQ , C.ITEM_CLS_NM , C.ITEM_CLS1 , C.ITEM_CLS2 , C.ITEM_CLS3 , C.ITEM_CLS4 , C.ITEM_CLS , C.UP_ITEM_CLS , P.ITEM_CLS_PATH_NM , (SELECT MAX(GATE_CD) FROM STOCMTCA WHERE GATE_CD =#{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD=#{CUST_CD} AND UP_ITEM_CLS=C.ITEM_CLS) AS UPYN , ((SELECT MAX(SG_NUM) FROM STOCSGMC WHERE M_CATE_YN='1' AND ITEM_CLS1=C.ITEM_CLS1 and ITEM_CLS2=C.ITEM_CLS2 and ITEM_CLS3 =C.ITEM_CLS3 and ITEM_CLS4 = C.ITEM_CLS4),'') AS SG_YN , ((SELECT CTRL_USER_ID FROM STOCSGMT WHERE SG_NUM = (SELECT MAX(SG_NUM) FROM STOCSGMC WHERE M_CATE_YN='1' AND ITEM_CLS1=C.ITEM_CLS1 and ITEM_CLS2=C.ITEM_CLS2 and ITEM_CLS3 =C.ITEM_CLS3 and ITEM_CLS4 = C.ITEM_CLS4)),'') AS SG_CTRL_USER_ID , ((SELECT getUserName(GATE_CD, CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) FROM STOCSGMT WHERE SG_NUM = (SELECT MAX(SG_NUM) FROM STOCSGMC WHERE M_CATE_YN='1' AND ITEM_CLS1=C.ITEM_CLS1 and ITEM_CLS2=C.ITEM_CLS2 and ITEM_CLS3 =C.ITEM_CLS3 and ITEM_CLS4 = C.ITEM_CLS4)),'') AS SG_CTRL_USER_NM FROM CTE_TABLE C JOIN ( SELECT MTCA.GATE_CD , MTCA.BUYER_CD , MTCA.ITEM_CLS1 , MTCA.ITEM_CLS2 , MTCA.ITEM_CLS3 , MTCA.ITEM_CLS4 , MTC1.ITEM_CLS_NM CASE WHEN MTC2.ITEM_CLS_NM IS NOT NULL THEN ' > ' MTC2.ITEM_CLS_NM ELSE '' END CASE WHEN MTC3.ITEM_CLS_NM IS NOT NULL THEN ' > ' MTC3.ITEM_CLS_NM ELSE '' END CASE WHEN MTC4.ITEM_CLS_NM IS NOT NULL THEN ' > ' MTC4.ITEM_CLS_NM ELSE '' END AS ITEM_CLS_PATH_NM FROM STOCMTCA MTCA LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCMTCA MTC1 ON (MTCA.GATE_CD = MTC1.GATE_CD AND MTCA.BUYER_CD = MTC1.BUYER_CD AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS1 = MTC1.ITEM_CLS1 AND MTC1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' AND MTC1.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCMTCA MTC2 ON (MTCA.GATE_CD = MTC2.GATE_CD AND MTCA.BUYER_CD = MTC2.BUYER_CD AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS1 = MTC2.ITEM_CLS1 AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS2 = MTC2.ITEM_CLS2 AND MTC2.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' AND MTC2.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCMTCA MTC3 ON (MTCA.GATE_CD = MTC3.GATE_CD AND MTCA.BUYER_CD = MTC3.BUYER_CD AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS1 = MTC3.ITEM_CLS1 AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS2 = MTC3.ITEM_CLS2 AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS3 = MTC3.ITEM_CLS3 AND MTC3.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' AND MTC3.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCMTCA MTC4 ON (MTCA.GATE_CD = MTC4.GATE_CD AND MTCA.BUYER_CD = MTC4.BUYER_CD AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS1 = MTC4.ITEM_CLS1 AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS2 = MTC4.ITEM_CLS2 AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS3 = MTC4.ITEM_CLS3 AND MTCA.ITEM_CLS4 = MTC4.ITEM_CLS4 AND MTC4.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' AND MTC4.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE MTCA.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND MTCA.BUYER_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND MTCA.USE_FLAG = '1' AND MTCA.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) P ON (C.GATE_CD = P.GATE_CD AND C.BUYER_CD = P.BUYER_CD AND C.ITEM_CLS1 = P.ITEM_CLS1 AND C.ITEM_CLS2 = P.ITEM_CLS2 AND C.ITEM_CLS3 = P.ITEM_CLS3 AND C.ITEM_CLS4 = P.ITEM_CLS4) WHERE 1 = 1
OR UPPER(P.ITEM_CLS_PATH_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CLS_NM}) '%'
ORDER BY C.SORT_SQ, C.ITEM_CLS1, C.ITEM_CLS2, C.ITEM_CLS3, C.ITEM_CLS4

mapper.select: SELECT MTGL.BUYER_CD , MTGL.ITEM_CD , MTGL.STD_ITEM_CD , MTGL.ITEM_DESC , MTGL.ITEM_SPEC , MTGL.ITEM_KIND_CD , getComCode(MTGL.GATE_CD, 'MP058', MTGL.ITEM_KIND_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS ITEM_KIND_NM , GETMKBRNAME(MTGL.GATE_CD, MTGL.BUYER_CD, 'MK', MTGL.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , GETMKBRNAME(MTGL.GATE_CD, MTGL.BUYER_CD, 'BR', MTGL.BRAND_CD) AS BRAND_NM , getComCode(MTGL.GATE_CD, 'M004', MTGL.ORIGIN_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS ORIGIN_NM , getComCode(MTGL.GATE_CD, 'M037', MTGL.UNIT_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS UNIT_NM , getItemClassPath(MTGL.GATE_CD, #{ses.manageCd}, MTGL.ITEM_CD) AS ITEM_CLS_NM , getComCode(MTGL.GATE_CD, 'M036', MTGL.VAT_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS VAT_NM , getComCode(MTGL.GATE_CD, 'MP009', MTGL.ITEM_STATUS, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS ITEM_STATUS_NM , getComCode(MTGL.GATE_CD, 'M044', MTGL.STD_FLAG, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS STD_FLAG_NM , getComCode(MTGL.GATE_CD, 'MP011', MTGL.NOT_STD_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS NOT_STD_TYPE_NM , GETMASK(GETUSERNAME(MTGL.GATE_CD, MTGL.MOD_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}), 'N') ' / ' (MTGL.MOD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS MOD_INFO , MTGL.MAKER_CD , MTGL.BRAND_CD , MTGL.MAKER_PART_NO , MTGL.ORIGIN_CD , MTGL.UNIT_CD , MTGC.ITEM_CLS1 , MTGC.ITEM_CLS2 , MTGC.ITEM_CLS3 , MTGC.ITEM_CLS4 , MTGL.VAT_CD , MTGL.ITEM_STATUS , MTGL.STD_FLAG , MTGL.NOT_STD_TYPE , MTGL.ITEM_RMK , MTGL.ATT_FILE_NUM , (SELECT MAX(UUID) AS UUID FROM STOCMTIM WHERE GATE_CD = MTGL.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = MTGL.BUYER_CD AND ITEM_CD = MTGL.ITEM_CD AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS IMG_ATT_FILE_NUM , (SELECT MAX(UUID_SQ) AS UUID FROM STOCMTIM WHERE GATE_CD = MTGL.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = MTGL.BUYER_CD AND ITEM_CD = MTGL.ITEM_CD AND MAIN_IMG_FLAG = '1' AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS MAIN_IMG_SQ FROM STOCMTGL MTGL JOIN STOCMTGC MTGC ON (MTGL.GATE_CD = MTGC.GATE_CD AND MTGL.BUYER_CD = MTGC.BUYER_CD AND MTGL.ITEM_CD = MTGC.ITEM_CD AND MTGC.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND MTGC.M_CATE_YN='1') WHERE MTGL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND MTGL.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND MTGL.STD_ITEM_CD = #{STD_ITEM_CD} AND MTGL.ITEM_CD = #{ITEM_CD} AND MTGL.DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCMTIM ( GATE_CD, BUYER_CD, ITEM_CD, UUID, UUID_SQ, REG_DATE, REG_USER_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_USER_ID, DEL_FLAG, MAIN_IMG_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.manageCd}, #{ITEM_CD}, #{IMG_ATT_FILE_NUM}, #{MAIN_IMG_SQ}, SYSDATE, #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE, #{ses.userId} , '0', '1' )
mapper.select:
SELECT ATTR_CD AS CODE , ATTR_NM AS CODE_NM FROM STOCMTAM WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{ses.manageCd}
AND ATTR_CD LIKE '%' #{CODE} '%'
AND UPPER(ATTR_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CODE_NM}) '%'
AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USE_FLAG = '1'

SELECT BUYER_CD , ATTR_CD , ATTR_NM , USE_FLAG , MDT_FLAG , ATTR_RMK FROM STOCMTAM WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{ses.manageCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND UPPER(ATTR_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ATTR_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(ATTR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ATTR_CD}) '%'

SELECT DISTINCT * FROM (SELECT GATE_CD , ITEM_CLS1 , ITEM_CLS2 , ITEM_CLS3 , ITEM_CLS4 , ITEM_CLS_NM , ITEM_CLS_TYPE , CASE WHEN ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN ITEM_CLS1 WHEN ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN ITEM_CLS2 WHEN ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN ITEM_CLS3 WHEN ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN ITEM_CLS4 END AS ITEM_CLS_ORI , USE_FLAG , SORT_SQ , BUYER_CD FROM STOCMTCA WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG} AND ITEM_CLS_TYPE = #{ITEM_CLS} AND ITEM_CLS_NM LIKE '%'#{ITEM_CLS_NM}'%'
UNION ALL
(SELECT T1.GATE_CD , T1.ITEM_CLS1 , T1.ITEM_CLS2 , T1.ITEM_CLS3 , T1.ITEM_CLS4 , T1.ITEM_CLS_NM , T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , CASE WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS1 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS2 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS3 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS4 END AS ITEM_CLS_ORI , T1.USE_FLAG , T1.SORT_SQ , T1.BUYER_CD FROM STOCMTCA T1 JOIN STOCMTCA T2 ON (T1.ITEM_CLS1 = T2.ITEM_CLS1 AND T1.GATE_CD = T2.GATE_CD AND T1.BUYER_CD = T2.BUYER_CD AND T2.DEL_FLAG='0') WHERE T1.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T1.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T1.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' AND T2.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG} AND T2.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = #{ITEM_CLS} AND UPPER( T2.ITEM_CLS_NM ) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CLS_NM}) '%' )
UNION ALL
(SELECT T1.GATE_CD , T1.ITEM_CLS1 , T1.ITEM_CLS2 , T1.ITEM_CLS3 , T1.ITEM_CLS4 , T1.ITEM_CLS_NM , T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , CASE WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS1 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS2 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS3 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS4 END AS ITEM_CLS_ORI , T1.USE_FLAG , T1.SORT_SQ , T1.BUYER_CD FROM STOCMTCA T1 JOIN STOCMTCA T2 ON (T1.ITEM_CLS1=T2.ITEM_CLS1 AND T1.ITEM_CLS2=T2.ITEM_CLS2 AND T1.GATE_CD=T2.GATE_CD AND T1.BUYER_CD=T2.BUYER_CD AND T2.DEL_FLAG='0') WHERE T1.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T1.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T1.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' AND T2.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG} AND T2.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = #{ITEM_CLS} AND UPPER( T2.ITEM_CLS_NM ) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CLS_NM}) '%' )
UNION ALL
(SELECT T1.GATE_CD , T1.ITEM_CLS1 , T1.ITEM_CLS2 , T1.ITEM_CLS3 , T1.ITEM_CLS4 , T1.ITEM_CLS_NM , T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , CASE WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS1 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS2 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS3 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS4 END AS ITEM_CLS_ORI , T1.USE_FLAG , T1.SORT_SQ , T1.BUYER_CD FROM STOCMTCA T1 JOIN STOCMTCA T2 ON (T1.ITEM_CLS1=T2.ITEM_CLS1 AND T1.ITEM_CLS2=T2.ITEM_CLS2 AND T1.ITEM_CLS3=T2.ITEM_CLS3 AND T1.GATE_CD=T2.GATE_CD AND T1.BUYER_CD=T2.BUYER_CD AND T2.DEL_FLAG='0') WHERE T1.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T1.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T1.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' AND T2.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG} AND T2.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = #{ITEM_CLS} AND UPPER( T2.ITEM_CLS_NM ) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CLS_NM}) '%' )
UNION ALL
(SELECT T1.GATE_CD , T1.ITEM_CLS1 , T1.ITEM_CLS2 , T1.ITEM_CLS3 , T1.ITEM_CLS4 , T1.ITEM_CLS_NM , T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , CASE WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS1 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS2 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS3 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS4 END AS ITEM_CLS_ORI , T1.USE_FLAG , T1.SORT_SQ , T1.BUYER_CD FROM STOCMTCA T1 JOIN STOCMTCA T2 ON (T1.ITEM_CLS1=T2.ITEM_CLS1 AND T1.ITEM_CLS2=T2.ITEM_CLS2 AND T1.ITEM_CLS3=T2.ITEM_CLS3 AND T1.ITEM_CLS4=T2.ITEM_CLS4 AND T1.GATE_CD=T2.GATE_CD AND T1.BUYER_CD=T2.BUYER_CD AND T2.DEL_FLAG='0') WHERE T1.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T1.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T1.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' AND T2.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG} AND T2.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = #{ITEM_CLS} AND UPPER( T2.ITEM_CLS_NM ) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CLS_NM}) '%' ) ) A ORDER BY SORT_SQ, ITEM_CLS1, ITEM_CLS2, ITEM_CLS3, ITEM_CLS4

SELECT DISTINCT * FROM ( SELECT GATE_CD , ITEM_CLS1 , ITEM_CLS2 , ITEM_CLS3 , ITEM_CLS4 , ITEM_CLS_NM , ITEM_CLS_TYPE , CASE WHEN ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN ITEM_CLS1 WHEN ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN ITEM_CLS2 WHEN ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN ITEM_CLS3 WHEN ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN ITEM_CLS4 END AS ITEM_CLS_ORI , USE_FLAG , SORT_SQ , BUYER_CD FROM STOCMTCA WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND( USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG} OR ITEM_CLS1 IN (SELECT T.ITEM_CLS1 FROM STOCMTCA T WHERE T.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' AND T.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG}) OR ITEM_CLS1 IN (SELECT T.ITEM_CLS1 FROM STOCMTCA T WHERE T.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' AND T.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG}) OR ITEM_CLS1 IN (SELECT T.ITEM_CLS1 FROM STOCMTCA T WHERE T.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' AND T.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG}) )
AND( ITEM_CLS_NM LIKE '%'#{ITEM_CLS_NM}'%' OR ITEM_CLS1 IN (SELECT T.ITEM_CLS1 FROM STOCMTCA T WHERE T.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' AND ITEM_CLS_NM LIKE '%'#{ITEM_CLS_NM}'%') OR ITEM_CLS1 IN (SELECT T.ITEM_CLS1 FROM STOCMTCA T WHERE T.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' AND ITEM_CLS_NM LIKE '%'#{ITEM_CLS_NM}'%') OR ITEM_CLS1 IN (SELECT T.ITEM_CLS1 FROM STOCMTCA T WHERE T.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' AND ITEM_CLS_NM LIKE '%'#{ITEM_CLS_NM}'%') )
AND ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1'
UNION ALL( SELECT T1.GATE_CD , T1.ITEM_CLS1 , T1.ITEM_CLS2 , T1.ITEM_CLS3 , T1.ITEM_CLS4 , T1.ITEM_CLS_NM , T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , CASE WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS1 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS2 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS3 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS4 END AS ITEM_CLS_ORI , T1.USE_FLAG , T1.SORT_SQ , T1.BUYER_CD FROM STOCMTCA T1 WHERE T1.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T1.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T1.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND( T1.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG} OR T1.ITEM_CLS2 IN (SELECT T.ITEM_CLS2 FROM STOCMTCA T WHERE T.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' AND T.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG}) OR T1.ITEM_CLS2 IN (SELECT T.ITEM_CLS2 FROM STOCMTCA T WHERE T.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' AND T.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG}) )
AND( T1.ITEM_CLS_NM LIKE '%'#{ITEM_CLS_NM}'%' OR T1.ITEM_CLS2 IN (SELECT T.ITEM_CLS2 FROM STOCMTCA T WHERE T.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' AND T.ITEM_CLS_NM LIKE '%'#{ITEM_CLS_NM}'%') OR T1.ITEM_CLS2 IN (SELECT T.ITEM_CLS2 FROM STOCMTCA T WHERE T.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' AND T.ITEM_CLS_NM LIKE '%'#{ITEM_CLS_NM}'%') )
AND T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' )
UNION ALL( SELECT T1.GATE_CD , T1.ITEM_CLS1 , T1.ITEM_CLS2 , T1.ITEM_CLS3 , T1.ITEM_CLS4 , T1.ITEM_CLS_NM , T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , CASE WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS1 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS2 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS3 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS4 END AS ITEM_CLS_ORI , T1.USE_FLAG , T1.SORT_SQ , T1.BUYER_CD FROM STOCMTCA T1 WHERE T1.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T1.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T1.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND( T1.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG} OR ITEM_CLS3 IN (SELECT T.ITEM_CLS3 FROM STOCMTCA T WHERE T.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' AND T.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG}) )
AND( UPPER( T1.ITEM_CLS_NM ) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CLS_NM}) '%' OR ITEM_CLS3 IN (SELECT T.ITEM_CLS3 FROM STOCMTCA T WHERE T.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND T.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' AND T.ITEM_CLS_NM LIKE '%'#{ITEM_CLS_NM}'%') )
AND T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' ) UNION ALL( SELECT T1.GATE_CD , T1.ITEM_CLS1 , T1.ITEM_CLS2 , T1.ITEM_CLS3 , T1.ITEM_CLS4 , T1.ITEM_CLS_NM , T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE , CASE WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS1 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS2 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS3 WHEN T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN T1.ITEM_CLS4 END AS ITEM_CLS_ORI , T1.USE_FLAG , T1.SORT_SQ , T1.BUYER_CD FROM STOCMTCA T1 WHERE T1.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND T1.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND T1.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND T1.USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG}
AND UPPER( T1.ITEM_CLS_NM ) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CLS_NM}) '%'
AND T1.ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' ) ) A ORDER BY SORT_SQ

SELECT GATE_CD , ITEM_CLS1 , ITEM_CLS2 , ITEM_CLS3 , ITEM_CLS4 , ITEM_CLS_NM , ITEM_CLS_TYPE , USE_FLAG , 'U' AS INSERT_FLAG , CASE WHEN ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C1' THEN ITEM_CLS1 WHEN ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' THEN ITEM_CLS2 WHEN ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' THEN ITEM_CLS3 WHEN ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' THEN ITEM_CLS4 END AS ITEM_CLS_ORI , BUYER_CD , SORT_SQ
,(SELECT D.ITEM_CLS_NM ' > ' C.ITEM_CLS_NM ' > ' B.ITEM_CLS_NM ' > ' A.ITEM_CLS_NM AS ITEM_PATH FROM STOCMTCA A JOIN STOCMTCA B ON A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.UP_ITEM_CLS = B.ITEM_CLS AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0' JOIN STOCMTCA C ON B.GATE_CD = C.GATE_CD AND B.UP_ITEM_CLS = C.ITEM_CLS AND B.BUYER_CD = C.BUYER_CD AND C.DEL_FLAG = '0' JOIN STOCMTCA D ON C.GATE_CD = D.GATE_CD AND C.UP_ITEM_CLS = D.ITEM_CLS AND C.BUYER_CD = D.BUYER_CD AND D.DEL_FLAG = '0' WHERE A.GATE_CD = MTCA.GATE_CD AND A.ITEM_CLS = MTCA.ITEM_CLS AND A.BUYER_CD = MTCA.BUYER_CD AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ITEM_PATH_NM
FROM STOCMTCA MTCA WHERE 1 = 1 AND GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USE_FLAG = #{USE_FLAG}
AND ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' AND ITEM_CLS1 IN ( SELECT ITEM_CLS1 FROM STOCMTCA WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C2' AND ITEM_CLS1 = #{ITEM_CLS_CLICKED} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} ) ORDER BY SORT_SQ
AND ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' AND ITEM_CLS2 IN ( SELECT ITEM_CLS2 FROM STOCMTCA WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C3' AND ITEM_CLS2 = #{ITEM_CLS_CLICKED} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} ) ORDER BY SORT_SQ
AND ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' AND ITEM_CLS3 IN ( SELECT ITEM_CLS3 FROM STOCMTCA WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ITEM_CLS_TYPE = 'C4' AND ITEM_CLS3 = #{ITEM_CLS_CLICKED} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} ) ORDER BY SORT_SQ

SELECT CASE WHEN #{ITEM_CLS_TYPE} = 'C1' THEN (SELECT (MAX(B.SORT_SQ), 0) + 1 FROM STOCMTCA B WHERE B.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND B.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND B.ITEM_CLS2 = #{ITEM_CLS2} AND B.ITEM_CLS3 = #{ITEM_CLS3} AND B.ITEM_CLS4 = #{ITEM_CLS4}) WHEN #{ITEM_CLS_TYPE} = 'C2' THEN (SELECT (MAX(B.SORT_SQ), 0) + 1 FROM STOCMTCA B WHERE B.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND B.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND B.ITEM_CLS1 = #{ITEM_CLS1} AND B.ITEM_CLS2 LIKE #{ITEM_CLS1}'%') WHEN #{ITEM_CLS_TYPE} = 'C3' THEN (SELECT (MAX(B.SORT_SQ), 0) + 1 FROM STOCMTCA B WHERE B.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND B.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND B.ITEM_CLS1 = #{ITEM_CLS1} AND B.ITEM_CLS2 = #{ITEM_CLS2} AND B.ITEM_CLS3 LIKE #{ITEM_CLS2}'%') WHEN #{ITEM_CLS_TYPE} = 'C4' THEN (SELECT (MAX(B.SORT_SQ), 0) + 1 FROM STOCMTCA B WHERE B.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND B.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND B.ITEM_CLS1 = #{ITEM_CLS1} AND B.ITEM_CLS2 = #{ITEM_CLS2} AND B.ITEM_CLS3 = #{ITEM_CLS3} AND B.ITEM_CLS4 LIKE #{ITEM_CLS3}'%') END AS VALUE
